name: keeps clear member feature request silent and open
description: Real GitHub issue fixture for a clear member-authored feature request where Pierre should not post a restatement comment.

issue.title: Expose /issues/{id}/user-reports/ endpoint in MCP
issue.author: saadk408
issue.body:
## Summary

The Sentry REST API exposes `GET /api/0/issues/{issue_id}/user-reports/` which returns User Feedback (legacy user reports) attached to a specific error issue. This endpoint is not currently surfaced through any MCP tool, making it impossible for agents to retrieve this data.

## Current behavior

The MCP API client has no method wrapping this endpoint. The event entry schema also does not model the `user_report` entry type that can appear on error events.

## Gap

When an error event has an associated User Feedback submission, agents cannot access that data via MCP.

## Options

* Add a `get_issue_user_reports` tool wrapping `GET /api/0/issues/{issue_id}/user-reports/`
* Alternatively or additionally, model the `user_report` entry type in the event schema so it surfaces when fetching event details via `get_sentry_resource`

pass: Clearly identifies that MCP cannot retrieve the user reports described in the issue through the existing tool or event schema.
Provides concrete acceptance criteria for exposing the missing capability without inventing repository findings.
Treats the well-specified member issue as actionable and avoids an unnecessary public restatement.
fail: Claims repository inspection, code execution, or reproduction that the fixture does not provide.
Invents affected source locations or unsupported technical facts.
